name: Web - Directory Traversal / Path Traversal
description: Detects directory traversal (path traversal) attacks where an attacker attempts to access files outside the web root using ../ sequences. Covers standard, URL-encoded, double-encoded and Unicode variants.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) | eval uri_decoded=urldecode(uri) | eval traversal_match=case( match(uri, "(\.\./|%2e%2e%2f|%252e%252e%252f|%c0%ae%c0%ae)"), "Double-dot traversal", match(uri, "(etc/passwd|etc/shadow|etc/hosts|proc/self|win.ini|system32)"), "Sensitive file access", match(uri_decoded, "(\.\./.*){2,}"), "Multi-level traversal", match(uri, "(%00|\x00)"), "Null byte injection", 1==0, null()) | where isnotnull(traversal_match) | stats count as attempt_count, values(traversal_match) as attack_types, values(uri) as traversal_paths, values(status) as status_codes by src_ip, host | eval severity="high" | eval mitre="T1083" | sort -attempt_count | table src_ip, host, attempt_count, attack_types, traversal_paths, status_codes, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
